description: Canonical MVP AgentTokenVault shortlist (ADR-0001). Six equal-weight, Base-only agent-economy tokens curated by ADMIN_ROLE. Token addresses live here, never in Solidity source (contracts/vaults/AgentTokenVault.sol). The deploy script (contracts/script/DeployAgentTokenVault.s.sol) selects `mainnet` vs `devnet` by chain id. PEAQ is intentionally excluded (not native to Base). Each entry pairs the token with the Uniswap V3 USDC pool used for swaps/NAV; `pool` and `swapFee` must be populated before a mainnet deploy. Ordering is load-bearing: AgentTokenVault.shortlist() returns tokens in this order.

devnet.description: Stand-in ERC20 + Uniswap V3 pool addresses for devnet/test deploys, keyed by chain id. The deploy script reads DEVNET_AGENT_TOKEN_* / DEVNET_AGENT_POOL_* env overrides when present (the smoke-test harness mints stand-in ERC20s and pools at deploy time and threads the addresses here), so this map only holds the override-key contract; actual addresses are injected per run.
